'''Sakai''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Thuris sector/Legends|Thuris sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] Sakai was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ruler of [[Thuris sector/Legends|Thuris sector]] who was critical of the way Moff [[Abran Balfour/Legends|Abran Balfour]] controlled the neighboring [[Parmic sector/Legends|Parmic sector]].<ref name="GG9" />

Soon after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], an elite [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForce]] team known as [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]] began opposing Sakai. To do so, they used the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] customized [[HT-2200 medium freighter]] ''[[Reekeene's Retribution]]'' in 1,200 armed attacks against their forces, as well as other resources. The Roughnecks were credited with the destruction of 872,000,000 tons of Imperial equipment including an orbital [[Shipyard/Legends|starship yard]], which might refer only to their actions against Sakai.<ref name="SS">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

Sakai managed to discover the identities of several members of the Roughnecks and contacted with the [[Special forces/Legends|special forces]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. They assigned a special unit, codenamed [[Venom Guard]], to track and execute the Roughnecks. After a multi-ship compound attack of the Rebel fleet against an Imperial fort in Thuris sector, the ''Retribution'' was infiltrated by intruders; this ship did not join the rest of its fleet.<ref name="SS" />
